title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.773 - Election of supervisors — terms — vacancies, how filled
text:
249.773.  Election of supervisors — terms — vacancies, how filled. — On each municipal election day, the voters of the district shall elect one supervisor who shall hold his office for five years or until his successor is elected and qualified.  Should a vacancy occur, the supervisors shall select a person to fill the vacancy who shall serve until the next regular election.
(L. 1961 p. 451 § 6, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971, A.L. 1982 S.B. 526) 
Effective 5-20-82
